channel.title: 🪴 Kirill Markin's Digital Garden
channel.description: Last 10 notes on 🪴 Kirill Markin's Digital Garden

item.title: Test Publication
item.description: This is a test note to verify that the publishing workflow is working correctly. If you can see this note on the public site, it means: The GitHub Actions workflow is working The submodule update is successful The site is being built and deployed correctly The site is being built and deployed correctly .
